titles.title: How Precious Is Your Love (You Are Faithful)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How precious is Your love for me It is beyond my understanding. Oh Lord, I want to realize The meaning of the price, Which You payed to save us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The very thought You died for me Inspires my heart with humble worship. I couldn't earn Your love by deeds, It's grace my spirit needs And Your redeeming favor.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Unto You I'll sing my song Lifting up Your name, Lord Jesus. Wondrous love is pure and strong Casting away my sins Changing me from within.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I stand amazed of what You do, You mold a vessel that's been broken. The image, Lord, You want to see Reflecting You in me The true and holy token.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You shall not break a reed of life That's bruised and scarred in this dark hour. You heal my body and my soul, Your love will make me whole By Your restoring power.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are faithful You're so faithful You're so faithful to me You're so faithful You are faithful.
